if.test: query != null and (query.gradeId != null or query.semesterId != null or query.courseId != null)

mapper.select:
select sem.id as semesterId, sem.semester_name as semesterName, count(1) as resultCount, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_rate), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentRate, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_value), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentValue from eval_course_target_result r inner join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = t.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id and cls.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_semester sem on sem.id = t.semester_id and sem.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id and c.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course_objective obj on obj.id = r.objective_id and obj.is_deleted = 0
group by sem.id, sem.semester_name order by sem.id asc

select c.id as id, c.course_code as code, c.course_name as name, count(1) as resultCount, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_rate), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentRate, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_value), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentValue, sum(case when r.attainment_rate < 100 then 1 else 0 end) as warningCount from eval_course_target_result r inner join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = t.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id and cls.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_semester sem on sem.id = t.semester_id and sem.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id and c.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course_objective obj on obj.id = r.objective_id and obj.is_deleted = 0
group by c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name order by avgAttainmentRate desc, c.id asc

select req.id as id, req.requirement_code as code, req.requirement_name as name, count(1) as resultCount, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_rate), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentRate, round(coalesce(avg(r.attainment_value), 0), 2) as avgAttainmentValue, sum(case when r.warning_flag = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as warningCount from eval_graduation_requirement_result r inner join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id and req.is_deleted = 0
group by req.id, req.requirement_code, req.requirement_name order by avgAttainmentRate desc, req.id asc

select r.id as resultId, req.id as requirementId, req.requirement_code as requirementCode, req.requirement_name as requirementName, r.attainment_rate as attainmentRate, r.attainment_value as attainmentValue, r.threshold_value as thresholdValue, r.warning_flag as warningFlag, r.lock_flag as lockFlag, r.calc_time as calcTime from eval_graduation_requirement_result r inner join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id and req.is_deleted = 0
order by req.sort_no asc, req.id asc

select count(1) from eval_course_target_result r inner join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = t.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id and cls.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_semester sem on sem.id = t.semester_id and sem.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id and c.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course_objective obj on obj.id = r.objective_id and obj.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0

select r.id as resultId, maj.major_name as majorName, coalesce(pv.version_name, pv.version_no) as programVersionName, sem.semester_name as semesterName, cls.class_name as className, c.course_name as courseName, t.task_code as taskCode, obj.objective_code as objectiveCode, obj.objective_name as objectiveName, m.model_name as modelName, r.attainment_rate as attainmentRate, r.attainment_value as attainmentValue, r.target_value as targetValue, r.result_level as resultLevel, r.locked_flag as lockedFlag, r.calc_time as calcTime, r.remark as remark from eval_course_target_result r inner join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = t.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id and cls.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_semester sem on sem.id = t.semester_id and sem.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id and c.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course_objective obj on obj.id = r.objective_id and obj.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0
order by r.calc_time desc, r.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select r.id as resultId, maj.major_name as majorName, coalesce(pv.version_name, pv.version_no) as programVersionName, sem.semester_name as semesterName, cls.class_name as className, c.course_name as courseName, t.task_code as taskCode, obj.objective_code as objectiveCode, obj.objective_name as objectiveName, m.model_name as modelName, r.attainment_rate as attainmentRate, r.attainment_value as attainmentValue, r.target_value as targetValue, r.result_level as resultLevel, r.locked_flag as lockedFlag, r.calc_time as calcTime, r.remark as remark from eval_course_target_result r inner join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = t.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id and cls.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_semester sem on sem.id = t.semester_id and sem.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id and c.is_deleted = 0 left join edu_course_objective obj on obj.id = r.objective_id and obj.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0
order by r.calc_time desc, r.id desc

select count(1) from eval_graduation_requirement_result r inner join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id and req.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0

select r.id as resultId, maj.major_name as majorName, coalesce(pv.version_name, pv.version_no) as programVersionName, req.requirement_code as requirementCode, req.requirement_name as requirementName, m.model_name as modelName, r.attainment_rate as attainmentRate, r.attainment_value as attainmentValue, r.threshold_value as thresholdValue, r.warning_flag as warningFlag, r.lock_flag as lockFlag, r.calc_time as calcTime, r.remark as remark from eval_graduation_requirement_result r inner join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id and req.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0
order by r.warning_flag desc, r.calc_time desc, r.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select r.id as resultId, maj.major_name as majorName, coalesce(pv.version_name, pv.version_no) as programVersionName, req.requirement_code as requirementCode, req.requirement_name as requirementName, m.model_name as modelName, r.attainment_rate as attainmentRate, r.attainment_value as attainmentValue, r.threshold_value as thresholdValue, r.warning_flag as warningFlag, r.lock_flag as lockFlag, r.calc_time as calcTime, r.remark as remark from eval_graduation_requirement_result r inner join tr_program_version pv on pv.id = r.program_version_id and pv.is_deleted = 0 left join org_major maj on maj.id = pv.major_id and maj.is_deleted = 0 left join tr_graduation_requirement req on req.id = r.requirement_id and req.is_deleted = 0 left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id and m.is_deleted = 0
order by r.warning_flag desc, r.calc_time desc, r.id desc
